leadText: Morpeko (Japanese: モルペコ Morpeko) is a dual-type Electric/Dark Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Morpeko can change forms with its Hunger Switch Ability, which also changes the type of its signature move, Aura Wheel. When Morpeko enters a battle for the first time, it is in its Full Belly Mode and Aura Wheel is Electric-type. At the end of each turn, Morpeko changes into its Hangry Mode and Aura Wheel becomes Dark-type.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Contents 1 Biology 1.1 Forms 1.1.1 Full Belly Mode 1.1.2 Hangry Mode Biology [ edit | edit source ] Morpeko is a short, chubby rodent Pokémon with two forms. The features shared between its forms are short, stubby arms and feet, a pair of pink circular cheek pouches, a very tiny nose, two almond-shaped ears with a single fur tuft under each, and a primary body color separating two areas of fur which cover the arms, ears, cheeks, and eyes, and zigzag inward towards its face, stopping at the waistline. These fur patches form pockets that it can store seeds in. On the back of its body is a pattern resembling a Pikachu 's tail that extends from the bottom half of its fur. Morpeko is the only known Pokémon capable of learning the move Aura Wheel . Is it also the only known Pokémon that can have Hunger Switch as an Ability . Forms [ edit | edit source ] Morpeko has two forms: Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode. Full Belly Mode Hangry Mode Full Belly Mode [ edit | edit source ] In its Full Belly Mode, Morpeko's body is a creamy yellow, and its eyes are circular and black with large white pupils. The fur on the left side of its body is black, and on the right side, it is brown. A single bucktooth can be seen protruding from its smiling mouth. Morpeko carries around Berry seeds that have been electrically roasted in its pockets. It treats the seeds with care as if they were precious treasures until it eats them as a snack. The seeds it stores keep Morpeko's hunger at bay due to its small stomach. Unless Morpeko continues to eat its stored seeds, it will become instantly hungry. However, as seen in the Pokémon Journeys: The Series episode Crowning the Chow Crusher! , once Morpeko is fully fed, it will refuse to eat more food and attack anyone who tries to feed it. Hangry Mode [ edit | edit source ] While in its Hangry Mode, Morpeko's primary body color turns purple, its eyes become downward-slanting red semi-circles, and its right-hand patch of fur turns from brown to black so that it matches the other side. Its mouth is also constantly formed into an angry snarl. Morpeko generates electricity with its cheek sacs, which consumes a lot of energy and causes it to become hungry no matter how much it eats. By experiencing prolonged hunger, the hormones in Morpeko shift in balance, and its fur color changes. As a result of intense hunger, Morpeko becomes aggressive, driven into committing all kinds of evil deeds and enacting extreme violence until their hunger is satisfied. The energy within its cheeks also changes from Electric-type to Dark-type . [ 1 ] ↑ Morpeko | Pokémon Sword and Pokémon Shield

Generation VIII Galar #344 Isle of Armor #104 Crown Tundra #157 Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Brilliant Diamond, Shining Pearl , and Legends: Arceus . Full Belly Mode Sword As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It's also generating electricity. Shield It carries electrically roasted seeds with it as if they're precious treasures. No matter how much it eats, it always gets hungry again in short order. Hangry Mode Sword Intense hunger drives it to extremes of violence, and the electricity in its cheek sacs has converted into a Dark-type energy. Shield Hunger hormones affect its temperament. Until its hunger is appeased, it gets up to all manner of evil deeds. Generation IX Paldea #— Kitakami #95 Blueberry #— Lumiose #— Hyperspace #070 Full Belly Mode Scarlet Morpeko eats seeds constantly to keep its hunger at bay. If it's hungry for too long, it grows wild and brutish. Violet It has a small stomach. If it isn't constantly eating the seeds it keeps in its pockets, it will get hungry immediately. Legends: Z-A This Pokémon is always hungry. It generates electricity by eating seeds it has stored up in its pocket-like pouches. Hangry Mode Scarlet Even after using up all its dark energy, this violent ruffian will keep running riot until its hunger is appeased. Violet Hunger has disrupted this Pokémon's hormonal balance. The Electric-type energy stored in its cheek sacs has turned into Dark-type energy. Legends: Z-A Intense hunger drives it to extremes of violence, and the electricity in its cheek sacs has converted into a Dark-type energy. PP Charge Electric Status — —% 20 Fake Out Normal Physical 40 100% 10 * Parting Shot Dark Status — 100% 20 Quash Dark Status — 100% 15 Rapid Spin Normal Physical 50 100% 40 Super Fang Normal Physical — 90% 10 Swagger Normal Status — 85% 15 Tickle Normal Status — 100% 20 Moves marked with an asterisk (*) must be chain bred onto Morpeko Bold indicates a move that gets STAB when used by Morpeko Italic indicates a move that gets STAB only when used by an Evolution of Morpeko Side game data [ edit | edit source ] Full Belly Mode [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon GO Base HP: 151 Base Attack: 192 Base Defense: 121 Egg Distance: N/A km Buddy Distance: 3 km Evolution Requirement: N/A Fast Attacks: Charge Beam , Bite , Thunder Shock Charged Attacks: Seed Bomb , Outrage , Aura Wheel (Electric), Psychic Fangs Hangry Mode [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon GO Base HP: 151 Base Attack: 192 Base Defense: 121 Egg Distance: N/A km Buddy Distance: 3 km Evolution Requirement: N/A Fast Attacks: Charge Beam , Bite , Thunder Shock Charged Attacks: Seed Bomb , Outrage , Aura Wheel (Dark), Psychic Fangs Morpeko changes forms every time it uses a Charged Attack. If it is switched out and back in again, it will always start in Full Belly Mode. Form data [ edit | edit source ] Morpeko has two forms that it switches between with its Hunger Switch Ability : Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode. It starts battles in Full Belly Mode and switches between forms at the end of every turn while it is sent out. It is always in Full Belly Mode outside of battle. Its signature move , Aura Wheel , is Electric-type when it is in Full Belly Mode and Dark-type when it is in Hangry Mode. Due to Pokémon Legends: Z-A not featuring Abilities, Morpeko changes between its forms after using Aura Wheel instead. In Pokémon Sword and Shield , Morpeko uses the generic form change animation. However, in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet and Pokémon Legends: Z-A, it has unique form change animations that show its tummy rumbling (when switching from Full Belly Mode to Hangry Mode) or eating a seed (when switching from Hangry Mode to Full Belly Mode). Default Full Belly Mode Morpeko Electric Dark Turn end ↔ Activate Hunger Switch Hangry Mode Morpeko Electric Dark Evolution data [ edit | edit source ] Unevolved Morpeko Electric Dark Sprites [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation VIII. sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry JN028 Morpeko Team Rocket 's Rotom Phone A Morpeko. Honestly... I'm just not feeling it today... JN070 Morpeko Goh 's Rotom Phone Morpeko, the Two-Sided Pokémon . An Electric and Dark-type . Morpeko satisfies its constant hunger and generates electricity by eating seeds from a pocket-like pouch.
